The '''DY-225 Heavy Blaster Pistol''' was a [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistol]] created by [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]].

==Description==
It was a popular weapon to use during riot control and kidnappings due to its powerful stun setting.

[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] operative [[Matt Talon]] included a DY-225 as part of his personal arsenal.<ref name="GG9">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''</ref>
